title: DAGGETT PLAZA - 1001 16th St, San Francisco, California - Parks
content: It's a very clean and well maintained park. This would be a great park to take a group of you had a lunch. Parking is pretty easy along 16th St.

title: The biggest park - Review of Golden Gate Park, San Francisco, CA
content: # The biggest park - Golden Gate Park. *   San Francisco - Things to Do. **#20** of 1,166 things to do in San Francisco. *   Image 4 1 ### SF: Hop-on Hop-off Sightseeing Tour with Optional Sunset Tour 4.1 (3,108) from $60. # The biggest park. Review of Golden Gate Park. This is the biggest park which I've visited in my life. this is all only inside the golden gate park !!!! *   Image 13 10 ### The Best of San Francisco eBike Tour 5.0 (16) from $104. The best Segway tour in San francisco. My father and I just did a 1.5 hour guided Segway tour of golden gate park. You follow the leader,on the Segway and they take you off-roading to see all the monuments and statues and flowers and shrubbery in the park. All in all, a fun way to spend time in golden gate park. It was a fun experience, and nice to see the park while not on foot.

title: The Best San Francisco Tours & Excursions - ExperienceFirst
content: ### How To Walk the High Line in NYC and Not Miss a Thing. ### Where To Experience Chicago’s Mob History: A Travel Guide. ## Experience the best San Francisco tours. A guided tour of San Francisco can be almost anything. A walk along Fisherman’s Wharf. Wherever you choose, you’ll have a local guide to make sure the experience is one you’ll never forget. ## Your guide to San Francisco. You’ll have fun in San Francisco no matter how many times you’ve visited, but here are three things to know before you go to make your first trip even better. * Fisherman’s Wharf Walking Tour. If you’re a first-time visitor and want to stay near the city’s major attractions, look for accommodations in Fisherman’s Wharf, Union Square, and Chinatown, as they’re all within walking distance to popular landmarks or have easy access to public transportation.
